title: OdinClaudeWorkerAdapter
description: Schema for the Odin Claude Worker Adapter — defines the contract for Claude Code acting as an external local worker within the Odin system. Static contract, not live execution proof.

adapter_id.description: Unique identifier for this adapter instance

worker_name.description: Human-readable name of the worker (e.g. Claude Code)

input_contract_refs.description: References to input contracts this adapter accepts

output_contract_refs.description: References to output contracts this adapter produces

binding_ref.description: Reference to the binding contract governing this adapter

modelworkpacket_ref.description: Reference to the ModelWorkPacket this adapter processes

allowed_actions.description: Actions this adapter is allowed to perform

forbidden_actions.description: Actions this adapter is forbidden from performing

return_contract.description: Contract defining the shape and claim boundary of returned candidate work

evidence_requirements.description: Evidence artifacts required to be submitted with the returned work

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this adapter does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — adapter output is candidate only, not a live execution proof

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this adapter does not claim or prove
